bullets: Serves as a frontline technical resource for 3,000+ students and faculty, resolving 70+ hardware and software tickets with a 60% first-contact resolution rate to minimize academic and administrative downtime.
Maintains the team's internal knowledge base documentation to reduce repeat ticket volume on common hardware and software issues.
Builds the weekly schedule for a 25-person student team, optimizing shift coverage for peak demand and reducing scheduling conflicts by 45%.
Provides Tier 1 technical support with a 5-star customer satisfaction rating, de-escalating user frustrations and resolving issues on first contact.

note: TUWIC welcomes students of all genders across majors.
bullets: Co-leads TECH Camp, TUWIC's flagship outreach event bringing ~25 middle school girls to campus to learn coding fundamentals and explore computer science careers.
Designs and leads instruction on an introductory Scratch coding curriculum, teaching computational logic fundamentals to all participants.
Planning to expand the program with a CyberTexas cybersecurity curriculum partnership and a new Python-focused weekend track for high schoolers.

Owned all volunteer operations for TECH Camp end-to-end: recruiting from Trinity's CS community, coordinating background checks and minor-safety trainings with Risk Management and HR, building the shift schedule, and delegating event-day tasks.
